name: Neisseria meningitidis serogroup b recombinant lp2086 b01 protein variant antigen
description: Neisseria meningitidis serogroup b recombinant lp2086 b01 protein variant antigen is a sterile vaccine for intramuscular injection indicated for the active immunization to prevent invasive disease caused by *Neisseria meningitidis* serogroup B. It is contained in the suspension of Trumenba, which is a vaccine is composed of two recombinant lipidated factor H binding protein (fHBP) variants from N. meningitidis serogroup B, one from fHBP subfamily A and one from subfamily B (A05 and B01, respectively).
